description: Sends a native desktop notification when Claude Code finishes responding. Supports Windows (PowerShell toast), macOS (osascript), and Linux (notify-send).

hooks.command: if command -v osascript >/dev/null 2>&1; then osascript -e 'display notification "Response complete" with title "Claude Code"'; elif command -v notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1; then notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Response complete'; elif command -v powershell.exe >/dev/null 2>&1; then powershell.exe -Command "[System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadWithPartialName('System.Windows.Forms') | Out-Null; $n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $n.Visible = $true; $n.ShowBalloonTip(3000, 'Claude Code', 'Response complete', 'Info'); Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $n.Dispose()"; fi
